title: Croatian Silky Pudding with Kanten
description: A light and refreshing dessert using traditional Croatian ingredients, including silky pudding and kanten agar.

ingredients.name: Kanten agar
ingredients.notes: Available at most Asian or health food stores

instructions: Combine kanten agar and water in a small saucepan and bring to a boil, stirring occasionally.
Reduce heat and simmer for 5 minutes, or until agar is fully dissolved.
Remove from heat and stir in silky pudding, granulated sugar, and vanilla extract.
Pour mixture into individual serving cups or ramekins.
Refrigerate for at least 4 hours, or until set.
Serve chilled, garnished with fresh fruit if desired.
Note: Be careful when handling agar, as it can be slippery and cause skin irritation.
